title: Strict mode runtime checks (dev-only assertions)
scenario_context: Catch impossible states in dev without prod overhead.
reasoning: invariant() throws in dev, no-op in prod. Use at boundaries.
backend_solution:
// shared/lib/invariant.ts
export function invariant(cond: any, msg: string): asserts cond { if (!cond) { if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') throw new Error(`Invariant: ${msg}`); /* prod: log + recover */ } }
